description.overview: Maltese are elegant toy dogs with flowing white coats. They've been lap dogs of royalty for centuries and remain popular companions today.
description.temperament: Maltese are gentle and affectionate but surprisingly fearless. They love their people and enjoy being pampered.
description.health: Prone to dental issues, luxating patella, liver shunts, and collapsed trachea. Regular dental care essential.
description.exercise: Low to moderate exercise needs. Short walks and indoor play. Good for apartments.

best_for: Those wanting a glamorous small dog
verdict.summary: Elegant, affectionate lap dogs perfect for apartment living. Maltese need daily grooming but are hypoallergenic. Best for adults who can handle them gently and enjoy pampering.
